name: Sweet Oat Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Melted or very soft butter
recipeInstructions: Not many bakeries still offer a basic yeasted bread that's rich with butter and eggs. This one is delicious - a good bread to introduce a friend or family member to the delights of whole grain bread. Mix the water, honey, and yeast in a bowl and let sit for a few minutes. Add the remaining ingredients, adding whole wheat flour as needed. Knead dough well until it is smooth and elastic. Let rise until doubled in size, shape into loaves, and place in oiled pans. Let rise again, then bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. From the Arcata Co-op Bakery. Makes 2 - 1 1/2 lb loaves.
